# Scripts for [![Shosetsu][shosetsu-badge]](https://gitlab.com/shosetsuorg/shosetsu) app

JavaScript can be added to Shosetsu using _HTML injection_ in `More » Settings » Reader » Html CSS` in the following way:

```html
...exicting CSS styles

</style> <!-- Close style tag -->

<!-- Inject script tag(s) here -->
<script>
  /* JavaScript code goes here */
</script>

<!-- Reopen style tag --> <style>
```

---

<p align="center">Available scripts:</p>

## Chapter outline

Used to display _Table of Contents_ overlay on long press.

You have to **longpress on empty space** (not on text) to trigger the overlay.

```html
<script
  data-start-open
  src="https://wasu-code.github.io/UserScripts/Shosetsu/outline.js"
></script>
```

[shosetsu-badge]: https://img.shields.io/badge/_-Shosetsu-a80000.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,
